title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 40.234 - Duty status required for conviction on certain offenses
text:
40.234.  Duty status required for conviction on certain offenses. — No person may be tried or punished for any offense provided for in sections 40.237 to 40.415, unless it was committed while the person was in a duty status.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1035 § 77)
